properties.body:
EFFECTIVE JANUARY 1ST, 2024, THE ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREAS WILL COMMENCE BROADCASTING THEIR INMARSAT WARNINGS AND FORECASTS USING NUMERIC NAV- OR METAREA IDENTIFIERS.
  
 THIS IS A TEST MESSAGE USING THE NUMERIC NAVAREA 19 IDENTIFIER TO ABLE MARINERS TO CHECK THEIR INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECEIVERS.
  
 VESSELS RECEIVING THIS MESSAGE, HAVE INMARSAT-C OR MINI-C RECEIVERS CAPABLE OF RECOGNIZING MESSAGES ADDRESSED USING NUMERIC ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREA IDENTIFIERS AND WILL CONTINUE TO RECEIVE ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREA WARNINGS AND FORECASTS AFTER JANUARY 1ST, 2024.
  
 THIS TEST MESSAGE HAS NO RELEVANCE FOR VESSELS WITH IRIDIUM GMDSS RECEIVERS. IRIDIUM GMDSS RECEIVER ARE NOT AFFECTED BY THE CHANGE OF ARCTIC NAV- AND METAREA MESSAGE ENCODING.
